# PetExpenses.com

Pet cost calculator for dogs and cats. Get personalized annual expense breakdowns — food, vet, insurance, grooming, supplies, and smart savings tips.

## Pages

- [Dog & Cat Cost Calculator](https://petexpenses.com/) — Calculate your pet's annual expenses by breed, size, and age. Powered by React with PostHog analytics.

## About

Single-page interactive tool built from 2026 US averages (APPA, AVMA, NAPHIA, BLS). No signup, no paywall.
